frame_analyses.description: Initial setup showing 6 objects (3 green, 3 orange) on pegs with on-screen instruction to touch blue ball
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Standard initial configuration for peg transfer task

frame_analyses.description: Left grasper engaging blue object to start timer, right grasper visible

Orange object being transferred from right grasper to left grasper in midair
First green object being picked up by right grasper for transfer to right side

Green object being picked up for transfer to right side, continuing reverse direction

frame_analyses.description: Final completion with all objects transferred to correct positions - 'Exercise completed' message visible

confidence_rationale: Excellent video quality with clear view of all transfers. Task completion clearly marked by on-screen message. No objects dropped or misplaced observed.
technique_summary: Expert-level performance with smooth bilateral coordination, efficient midair transfers, and precise placement. Completion time of 48 seconds falls within expert benchmark range (40-60s).
strengths: Efficient movement patterns with minimal wasted motion
improvement_suggestions: Performance already at expert level with minimal room for improvement
